ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Receipts For Computer, Etc.
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Continued To May-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The matter was continued to May 16, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to send a new Notice to Appear to the Guardian at her Pittsburgh address to explain why the receipt for the re-depsoit to the blocked account has not been filed.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Receipts For Computer, Etc.
Off Calendar Mar-14-2011 Continued To Apr-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court issued a notice to appear to Lateefah Childress to appear on April 25, 2011 and explain why she hasn't restored the funds to the blocked account.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2009 Continued To Mar-10-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claims
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Compromise the Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David J. Friedenberg, Esq. appeared with petitioner Lateefah Childress, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Na'Riiah Childress, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $5,500.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,718.49.
Medical Expenses - $284.00.
Costs - $344.53.

A net balance of $3,152.98 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located in Pittsburg, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Petitionto Approve
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Compromise the Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David J. Friedenberg, Esq. appeared with petitioner Denise Higgins, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Tiana Watson, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $10,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $3,218.49.
Medical Expenses - $858.48.
Costs - $344.53.

A net balance of $5,578.70 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual Bank - Green house Center, San Leandro, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
